cves.description: A critical remote code execution vulnerability in ExampleCorp WebServer allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary commands via crafted HTTP requests to the management interface.
SQL injection vulnerability in Acme CRM application allows authenticated users to extract sensitive data from the backend database through specially crafted search queries.
Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in WidgetLib dashboard component allows attackers to inject malicious scripts via the search parameter.
Duplicate vector entry — same vector as CVE-2026-10001 to test deduplication. Buffer overflow in FooCorp Router firmware.
Information disclosure in CloudSync API allows unauthenticated users to enumerate valid usernames through timing differences in login responses.
